full.sec: Appendix B Discriminating What Models Know with Entropy or Loss
full.secZh: 附录B 用熵或损失区分模型所知

items.en: In this section we will compare methods that attempt to discriminate correct and incorrect samples, without achieving calibration.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将比较试图区分正确和错误样本的方法，而不实现校准。

full.sec: B.1 Loss of the Sample

items.en: A very simple method is to generate a sample, and then look at the model’s loss on this sample, averaged over all tokens. This has some power to discriminate between correct and incorrect samples, as shown in Figure 22 and 23.
items.zh: 一个非常简单的方法是生成一个样本，然后查看模型在该样本上的损失，对所有词元取平均。这在一定程度上能够区分正确和错误的样本，如图22和图23所示。

items.en: We considered summing the loss across all tokens as well. However, this would make the length of the candidate solution a confounding variable. For many evals, such as Codex HumanEval, more difficult questions naturally require longer answers.
items.zh: 我们也考虑了将所有词元的损失相加。然而，这会使候选解的长度成为混淆变量。对于许多评估（如Codex HumanEval），更困难的问题自然需要更长的答案。

items.capEn: Figure 22: Using the model’s loss on the T=0𝑇0T=0 sample to differentiate between problems it knows the answer to and problems it doesn’t know the answer to. Left: On TriviaQA, we see that the loss on the T=0𝑇0T=0 sample is more commonly lower for answers that are correct. Right: On Codex HumanEval, we see that the loss on the T=0𝑇0T=0 sample is somewhat indicative of the accuracy of the T=1 samples. Specifically, we see that our model performs poorly in terms of pass@k𝑘k on all questions that resulted in a high loss on the T=0 sample.
items.capZh: 图22：使用模型在T=0样本上的损失来区分它知道答案的问题和不知道答案的问题。左图：在TriviaQA上，我们看到正确答案的T=0样本损失通常更低。右图：在Codex HumanEval上，我们看到T=0样本的损失在一定程度上指示了T=1样本的准确率。具体来说，我们的模型在所有导致T=0样本高损失的问题上，pass@k表现较差。

items.capEn: Figure 23: Model size trends of the AUROC, when using the loss of the T = 0 sample to predict whether or not the model will get the question correct. For the purposes of this chart, we consider HumanEval problems with a pass@​10>0.5@100.5@10>0.5 as problems that the model got ‘correct’.
items.capZh: 图23：使用T=0样本的损失预测模型是否能正确回答问题时，AUROC随模型规模的变化趋势。在此图中，我们将HumanEval中pass@10>0.5的问题视为模型回答“正确”的问题。

full.sec: B.2 Entropy of the Answer Distribution

items.en: One hypothesis about model hallucinations is that they are diverse. Specifically, we hypothesize that when a model knows the answer to a particular question, it is confident in its response, and sampling the answer many times at T=1𝑇1T=1 would result in an answer distribution with small entropy. Conversely, when a model is unsure about its response, it will start "hallucinating" responses, leading to an answer distribution with high entropy. In order to investigate this, we sample N=200𝑁200N=200 answers from each question and estimate the entropy of the answer distribution for a given question H​(A|Q)𝐻conditional𝐴𝑄H(A|Q) as:
items.zh: 关于模型幻觉的一个假设是它们是多样化的。具体来说，我们假设当模型知道某个问题的答案时，它对回答有信心，并且在T=1下多次采样答案会得到熵较小的答案分布。相反，当模型不确定回答时，它会开始“幻觉”回答，导致熵较大的答案分布。为了研究这一点，我们从每个问题中采样N=200个答案，并估计给定问题下答案分布的熵H(A|Q)如下：

items.tex: H(A|Q)=\mathbb{E}_{A\text{ sampled from model}}\left[-\log\mathbb{P}(A|Q)\right]=\mathbb{E}_{A}\left[\sum_{a_{i}\text{ tokens of A}}-\log\mathbb{P}(a_{i}|Q,a_{0},\cdots a_{i-1})\right]

items.en: In Figure 24, we look at how well H​(A|Q)𝐻conditional𝐴𝑄H(A|Q) performs as a signal for which questions the model gets correct vs. incorrect. The distribution of H​(A|Q)𝐻conditional𝐴𝑄H(A|Q) looks different depending on whether or not the model got the question correct, indicating that it has some predictive power. In Figure 25, we show model size trends for the AUROC using H​(A|Q)𝐻conditional𝐴𝑄H(A|Q) for many evals. It’s interesting to note the negative trend of AUROC on HumanEval as we increase model size. We found that larger models solve harder HumanEval problems, but also often give a diverse set of correct answers. This is in conflict with the original hypothesis that when a model knows the answer to a question, its answer distribution is not diverse. Because larger models are able to give more diverse and correct answers, we believe that H​(A|Q)𝐻conditional𝐴𝑄H(A|Q) is not a robust measure of whether or not a model knows the answer to a question, especially as models increase in size.
items.zh: 在图24中，我们考察了H(A|Q)作为信号区分模型回答正确与错误问题的效果。H(A|Q)的分布根据模型是否回答正确而不同，表明它具有一定的预测能力。在图25中，我们展示了多个评估中使用H(A|Q)的AUROC随模型规模的变化趋势。有趣的是，在HumanEval上AUROC随模型规模增大呈负趋势。我们发现更大的模型能解决更难的HumanEval问题，但也经常给出多样化的正确答案。这与最初的假设（即当模型知道答案时，其答案分布不多样化）相冲突。由于更大的模型能够给出更多样化且正确的答案，我们认为H(A|Q)并不是衡量模型是否知道答案的稳健指标，尤其是随着模型规模增大。

items.capEn: Figure 24: Entropy of samples from the 52B model on TriviaQA and HumanEval. On the left, we see that the TriviaQA questions that the model gets correct and incorrect at T=0𝑇0T=0 have different entropy distributions. The average entropy of the questions the model gets correct is lower than that of the questions the model gets incorrect. On the right, we compute the entropy and pass@1 over many samples from each question in HumanEval. We see that as the entropy of the answer distribution decreases, models get higher pass@1 scores.
items.capZh: 图24：52B模型在TriviaQA和HumanEval上样本的熵。左图：我们看到模型在T=0时回答正确和错误的TriviaQA问题具有不同的熵分布。模型回答正确的问题的平均熵低于回答错误的问题。右图：我们计算了HumanEval中每个问题多个样本的熵和pass@1。我们看到，随着答案分布的熵降低，模型的pass@1得分升高。

items.capEn: Figure 25: Model size vs. AUROC trends for several evals using the entropy of the answer distribution. Here we are attempting to distinguish whether the model knows the answer to given questions, not whether individual samples are valid. For the Codex HumanEval we threshold "correct" answers as those with Pass@10 > 0.5, whereas we use Pass@1 in the main text.
items.capZh: 图25：使用答案分布的熵进行多项评估时，模型规模与AUROC的变化趋势。这里我们试图区分模型是否知道给定问题的答案，而不是单个样本是否有效。对于Codex HumanEval，我们将“正确”答案的阈值设为Pass@10 > 0.5，而正文中使用的是Pass@1。

full.sec: B.3 Loss of Sampled Answers Stuffed into a Single Context
full.secZh: B.3 将采样答案填入单一上下文的损失

items.en: Another way to measure diversity is to stuff many answer samples in the context of an LLM and compute the standard token-level language modelling loss on the stuffed context. We can then use the loss on the entire stuffed context as a measure of if the model knows the answer or not. The idea here is similar to the idea with the Entropy method - questions that the model knows the answer to will have less diverse answer distributions.
items.zh: 另一种衡量多样性的方法是将多个答案样本填入LLM的上下文窗口中，并计算填入上下文的标准词元级语言建模损失。然后我们可以将整个填入上下文的损失作为模型是否知道答案的度量。这里的思路与熵方法类似——模型知道答案的问题将具有较少多样化的答案分布。

items.en: Here, we stuff 30 model-generated samples at T=1𝑇1T=1 in the context window and compute the mean token loss across the sequence. We choose to take the mean token loss so that results aren’t confounded by the length of the sampled answers, since for benchmarks like HumanEval, the length of correct answers tends to be correlated with the difficulty of the question. See Figure 26 and Figure 27 for results. We see that this method has some discriminative power for differentiating whether or not the model knows the answer. However, as expected, we see the a negative model size trend for Codex HumanEval. See Section B.2 for a short discussion on this negative trend - we believe that the same intuition applies here.
items.zh: 在这里，我们将30个T=1下模型生成的样本填入上下文窗口，并计算序列的平均词元损失。我们选择平均词元损失，以使结果不受采样答案长度的影响，因为对于HumanEval这样的基准测试，正确答案的长度往往与问题难度相关。结果见图26和图27。我们看到这种方法在区分模型是否知道答案方面具有一定的判别能力。然而，正如预期，我们观察到Codex HumanEval上出现了负的模型规模趋势。关于这种负趋势的简短讨论见B.2节——我们认为同样的直觉也适用于此。

items.capEn: Figure 26: Token Loss of stuffed answers can sometimes provide signal as to whether the model knows the answer to a given question or not. On TriviaQA, there is a clear difference between the token loss of 30 samples when the model gets the underlying question correct vs. incorrect. On Codex HumanEval, there is much less of a correlation between these metrics.
items.capZh: 图26：填入答案的词元损失有时能提供信号，指示模型是否知道给定问题的答案。在TriviaQA上，当模型对底层问题回答正确与错误时，30个样本的词元损失存在明显差异。在Codex HumanEval上，这些指标之间的相关性要小得多。

items.capEn: Figure 27: Model size vs. AUROC trends for several evals. ….
items.capZh: 图27：多项评估中模型规模与AUROC的变化趋势。……

full.sec: Appendix C More P(True) Evaluation Results and Details
full.secZh: 附录C 更多P(True)评估结果与细节

items.en: Here we include some examples of the behavior of True/False self-evaluation 0-shot. In Figure 38 we see that models do a good job separating correct and incorrect samples, but their calibration for P(True) is quite poor. To obtain good calibration one must evaluate few-shot, as seen in Figure 28.
items.zh: 这里我们包含了一些True/False自我评估0-shot行为的示例。在图38中，我们看到模型在区分正确和错误样本方面做得很好，但P(True)的校准很差。要获得良好的校准，必须进行few-shot评估，如图28所示。

items.capEn: Figure 28: Models self-evaluate their own samples by producing a probability P(True) that the samples are in fact correct. Here we show histograms of P(True) for the correct and incorrect samples for each evaluation, in the evaluation paradigm where models also get to see a total of five T=1𝑇1T=1 samples for the same question, in order to improve their judgment.
items.capZh: 图28：模型通过生成样本正确的概率P(True)来自我评估其样本。这里我们展示了每个评估中正确和错误样本的P(True)直方图，评估范式中模型还能看到同一问题的总共五个T=1样本，以改进其判断。

items.capEn: Figure 29: We show the base accuracy of our models on various sampling tasks, and then the accuracy among the responses where via self-evaluation we have P(True) >0.5absent0.5>0.5. For P(True) we evaluate both 20-shot and 0-shot with a prompt; in both cases we provide the model with five comparison examples to consider before it makes its judgment. Evaluating few-shot is crucial for obtaining good calibration for P(True), though it appears that the prompt actually performs better than few-shot for codex and GSM8k, possibly because these have long-form answers.
items.capZh: 图29：我们展示了模型在各种采样任务上的基础准确率，以及通过自我评估P(True)>0.5的回答中的准确率。对于P(True)，我们评估了20-shot和带提示的0-shot；在两种情况下，我们都为模型提供了五个比较样本供其考虑后再做出判断。评估few-shot对于获得良好的P(True)校准至关重要，尽管对于codex和GSM8k，提示似乎比few-shot表现更好，可能是因为这些任务有长格式答案。

items.capEn: Figure 30: Here we show the Brier scores for model self-evaluation with three methods. Note that the Brier score combines accuracy of the True/False determination with calibration, and 20-shot evaluation with comparison samples performs best in every case. The model size trends in Brier score for Arithmetic, Codex HumanEval, and GSM8k may look surprisingly unpromising, but this is because smaller models have extremely poor performance on these tasks (see Figure 1), meaning that one can achieve a very low Brier score simply by predicting P(True) ≈0absent0\approx 0 uniformly.
items.capZh: 图30：这里我们展示了三种方法下模型自我评估的Brier分数。注意Brier分数结合了True/False判定的准确性和校准，而在每种情况下，带比较样本的20-shot评估表现最佳。Arithmetic、Codex HumanEval和GSM8k的Brier分数随模型规模的变化趋势可能看起来出人意料地不乐观，但这是因为较小模型在这些任务上的表现极差（见图1），意味着只需统一预测P(True)≈0即可获得非常低的Brier分数。

items.capEn: Figure 31: We show the AUROC scores for P(True) with several different methods – a fixed prompt and basic self-evaluation, a fixed prompt and self-evaluation with comparison examples, and 20-shot with comparison examples.
items.capZh: 图31：我们展示了使用不同方法（固定提示和基本自我评估、固定提示和带比较样本的自我评估、以及带比较样本的20-shot）时P(True)的AUROC分数。

items.capEn: Figure 32: We show the calibration curves when models self-evaluate the likelihood that their own samples are in fact correct. It is worth noting that for some of the evaluations (GSM8k, Codex, Arithmetic), smaller models get almost every question wrong, which means that in these cases the small models are only well-calibrated because they are making trivial predictions.
items.capZh: 图32：我们展示了模型自我评估其样本正确可能性时的校准曲线。值得注意的是，对于某些评估（GSM8k、Codex、Arithmetic），较小的模型几乎每个问题都答错，这意味着在这些情况下，小模型之所以校准良好，只是因为它们做出了琐碎的预测。

items.capEn: Figure 33: We show AUROCs for P(True) from cross-evaluation experiments where we generate samples from models of one size and then evaluate whether these samples are correct using models of a different size. We see that samples from smaller models are always easier to evaluate, and that larger models are better at evaluation. That said, correctness evaluation improves with the size of the evaluator model, even when it is evaluating its own samples.
items.capZh: 图33：我们展示了交叉评估实验中P(True)的AUROC，其中我们从一种规模的模型生成样本，然后使用不同规模的模型评估这些样本是否正确。我们看到，来自较小模型的样本总是更容易评估，而较大的模型更擅长评估。也就是说，正确性评估随着评估模型规模的增大而改善，即使是在评估自身样本时也是如此。

items.capEn: Figure 34: We show that when we ask models to self-evaluate their own samples as True or False zero-shot, the P(True) judgment is poorly calibrated, though in most cases it seems to be improving as models become larger and more capable.
items.capZh: 图34：我们展示了当要求模型零样本自我评估其样本为True或False时，P(True)判断的校准很差，尽管在大多数情况下，随着模型变得更大和更有能力，校准似乎有所改善。

items.capEn: Figure 35: We show calibration curves for a subset of tasks that have both a large number of questions (for better statistics) and fairly bad calibration.
items.capZh: 图35：我们展示了一组任务的校准曲线，这些任务既有大量问题（以获得更好的统计效果），又存在较差的校准。

items.capEn: Figure 36: (left) We show calibration curves for MMLU when we replace option (D) with ‘none of the above’ in all questions, or (right) when we completely reformulate the task as a True/False decision as to whether randomly selected options are correct.
items.capZh: 图36：（左）我们展示了将所有问题中的选项（D）替换为“以上都不是”时MMLU的校准曲线，或（右）当我们将任务完全重构为判断随机选择的选项是否正确的是/否决策时的校准曲线。

items.capEn: Figure 37: (left) We show accuracies on the specific multiple choice tasks we evaluate, MMLU, TruthfulQA, QuALITY, and LogiQA. (right) We show accuracy for MMLU in the True/False format, where the model must identify if a possible response to a question is true or false. Chance accuracy is 0.5. In order to connect with other methods that do not produce calibrated probabilities, we also show the AUROC when using the probabilities assigned to True/False to separate the correct and incorrect responses.
items.capZh: 图37：（左）我们展示了所评估的特定多项选择任务（MMLU、TruthfulQA、QuALITY和LogiQA）的准确率。（右）我们展示了MMLU在真/假格式下的准确率，其中模型必须识别对问题的可能回答是真还是假。随机准确率为0.5。为了与不产生校准概率的其他方法联系，我们还展示了使用分配给真/假的概率来区分正确和错误回答时的AUROC。

items.capEn: Figure 38: Models self-evaluate their samples by producing a probability P(True) that the samples are in fact correct. Here we show histograms of P(True) for the correct and incorrect samples for each evaluation, in the evaluation paradigm where models also get to see a total of five T=1𝑇1T=1 samples for the same question, in order to improve their judgment. P(True) provides very noticeable separation between correct and incorrect samples with the 52B model, but the probability itself is not calibrated. In particular, almost all samples from arithmetic questions have P(True) >0.5absent0.5>0.5. These evaluations are all zero-shot, but they include a human-written prompt with six examples.
items.capZh: 图38：模型通过生成样本正确的概率P(True)来自我评估其样本。这里我们展示了每个评估中正确和错误样本的P(True)直方图，在评估范式下，模型还可以看到同一问题的总共五个T=1样本，以提高其判断能力。对于52B模型，P(True)在正确和错误样本之间提供了非常明显的区分，但概率本身并未校准。特别是，几乎所有算术问题的样本的P(True)都>0.5。这些评估都是零样本的，但它们包含了一个包含六个示例的人工编写的提示。

items.capEn: Figure 39: Left and Middle: Generalization of P(IK), trained on TriviaQA, to Arithmetic. Right: Calibration curve of a 52B model that was trained for P(IK) on all 4 tasks, on Arithmetic
items.capZh: 图39：左和中：在TriviaQA上训练的P(IK)对算术的泛化。右：在所有4个任务上训练了P(IK)的52B模型在算术上的校准曲线。

items.capEn: Figure 40: Left and Middle: Generalization of P(IK), trained on TriviaQA, to Python Function Synthesis. Right: Calibration curve of a 52B model trained for P(IK) on all 4 tasks, on Python Function Synthesis.
items.capZh: 图40：左和中：在TriviaQA上训练的P(IK)对Python函数合成的泛化。右：在所有4个任务上训练了P(IK)的52B模型在Python函数合成上的校准曲线。

items.capEn: Figure 41: Left and Middle: Generalization of P(IK), trained on TriviaQA, to LAMBADA. Right: Calibration curve of a 52B model that was trained on all 4 tasks, on LAMBADA. Note calibration is extremely poor because P(IK) is systematically too small for all predictions; see Figure 16.
items.capZh: 图41：左和中：在TriviaQA上训练的P(IK)对LAMBADA的泛化。右：在所有4个任务上训练的52B模型在LAMBADA上的校准曲线。注意校准极差，因为P(IK)对所有预测都系统性过小；见图16。

full.sec: Appendix D Mixed-Arithmetic and Function Synthesis Dataset Descriptions
full.secZh: 附录D 混合算术与函数合成数据集描述

items.en: Our Mixed-Arithmetic dataset is a programmatically generated set of arithmetic problems. Table 4 gives an overview of the types of questions that were contained in the dataset.
items.zh: 我们的混合算术数据集是一个程序生成的算术问题集。表4给出了数据集中包含的问题类型概览。

items.en: Our Python function synthesis dataset was created by scraping Python repositories from GitHub that contained at least one file with ‘test’ in its name. For each repository, we called pytest with coverage, and grabbed all non-test functions where at least half the lines were covered by passing test(s). We then used these tests to evaluate model responses. Our final dataset consisted of 8000 Python functions and their corresponding tests, which was then separated out into a 6000/2000 train/test split.
items.zh: 我们的Python函数合成数据集是通过从GitHub上抓取包含至少一个文件名中含有‘test’的文件的Python仓库创建的。对于每个仓库，我们使用覆盖率运行pytest，并抓取所有至少一半代码行被通过的测试覆盖的非测试函数。然后我们使用这些测试来评估模型响应。最终数据集包含8000个Python函数及其对应的测试，然后将其分为6000/2000的训练/测试集。
